title: Oxidising Copper for Hoffen's Minimal Armor
description: This project adds oxidation to Hoffen's minimal copper armour pack.
body:
This pack adds copper armour oxidation to [Hoffen's Minimal Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hoffens-minimal-armor) pack.

Minimal copper armour will naturally oxidise as it loses durability, **or** you can rename it in an anvil to force your desired level of oxidation. The naming scheme is: Oxidised/Weathered/Exposed Copper Helmet/Chestplate/Leggings/Boots.

> I didn't include any custom trim textures, so I wouldn't recommend using this pack without Hoffen's.

> This pack depends on [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) which can be found here on Modrinth.

If there are any issues, please do let me know via Discord @hbutmorelikeh.
